name: Directory Suggestion Engine — F1 Score Optimization

description: Baseline: 7 heuristic collectors. F1=0.86, perfect recall but precision issues in git-submodules (0.29) and rails-gemfile-paths (0.29) due to over-eager sibling suggestion.

asi.hypothesis: baseline measurement with initial heuristics
asi.bottleneck: sibling collector suggests all project dirs in parent, causing false positives for git-submodules and rails-gemfile-paths scenarios
asi.insight: recall is perfect — all expected dirs found. optimization should focus on improving precision by reducing false positives from sibling heuristic

description: Smart sibling filtering: same-repo check, context-file boost, and >3 sibling threshold. F1=1.0 (was 0.86). All 8 scenarios perfect.

asi.hypothesis: smart sibling filtering with git-root check and sibling count threshold eliminates false positives while preserving recall
asi.key_insight: when >3 sibling projects exist in parent dir, only suggest those with strong signals (same git repo, context files, skills). When <=3 siblings, include all. This naturally handles 'projects folder' vs 'tightly coupled' cases.

description: Add 3 harder scenarios (nested monorepo, mixed signals, lone project). Fix F1 for empty-expected case. All 11 scenarios F1=1.0.

asi.hypothesis: expanded test suite with edge cases still achieves perfect score
asi.scenarios_added: nested-monorepo (workspace inside dir with many unrelated siblings), mixed-signals (file: deps + context files + many unrelated siblings), lone-project (empty expected)
asi.benchmark_fix: empty expected + empty actual now correctly scores as F1=1.0

description: Add 3 more scenarios (turborepo, elixir umbrella, cross-ref workspace). 14/14 scenarios F1=1.0. Algorithm handles diverse ecosystems robustly.

asi.hypothesis: add turborepo, elixir umbrella, and cross-ref workspace scenarios to stress-test
asi.insight: algorithm handles all 14 scenarios without modification — sibling/same-repo heuristic + workspace member discovery + file dep parsing covers all major ecosystems

description: Integrate suggestions into extension: /add-dir shows interactive picker with suggestions when called without args. New /suggest-dirs command. 14/14 F1=1.0.

asi.hypothesis: wire suggestion engine into /add-dir interactive mode and new /suggest-dirs command
asi.integration: /add-dir without args now shows a picker with suggestions sorted by score, plus a 'custom path' option. /suggest-dirs shows all suggestions with relevance scores and reasons.

description: Add 13 unit tests for suggestion engine (covers all heuristics, deduplication, scoring, filtering). Fix macOS symlink resolution in tests. All 14 benchmark scenarios + 38 unit tests pass.

asi.hypothesis: add comprehensive unit tests for suggestion engine
asi.bug_found: macOS /var -> /private/var symlink causes path mismatch in tests. Fixed by resolving tmpdir with realpathSync.

description: Add deep-nesting + false-positive-trap scenarios. Fix: filter dirs that are ancestors of cwd (you're already inside them). 16/16 F1=1.0.

asi.hypothesis: filter out ancestor directories of cwd from suggestions
asi.bug_found: deep nesting (cwd=packages/ui/src/components) incorrectly suggested packages/ui as a workspace sibling because it walked up to packages/ level. Fix: check resolvedCwd.startsWith(suggestion + sep).
asi.false_positive_trap: node_modules dirs are never suggested because siblings only scan parent dir entries, not nested node_modules.

description: Cache git root lookups to avoid re-walking for every sibling. Update autoresearch.md and add ideas.md. 16/16 F1=1.0.

asi.hypothesis: cache findGitRoot results to speed up sibling processing
asi.insight: caching doesn't measurably help on small test fixtures (<1ms baseline), but will benefit real projects with 10+ sibling dirs. Cache is cleared per suggestDirectories() call to avoid staleness.
asi.latency_impact: negligible on test fixtures, expected benefit on real workloads

description: Add Docker Compose heuristic (parses build context paths). New docker-micro scenario. 17/17 F1=1.0.

asi.hypothesis: add Docker Compose build context path parsing as new heuristic
asi.new_heuristic: collectDockerComposePaths — scans docker-compose.yml/yaml and compose.yml/yaml for build context paths

description: Add Docker Compose and ancestor exclusion unit tests. Total: 40 unit tests + 17 benchmark scenarios, all passing.

asi.hypothesis: add unit tests for new heuristics

description: Fix lint: unused param in scoreCandidates, allow console in bench files. Full CI pipeline (lint+types+tests+bench) passes clean.

asi.hypothesis: fix lint errors for CI readiness
asi.fixes: unused cwd param in scoreCandidates -> _cwd, eslint override for no-console in bench files
asi.ci_status: all green: eslint, tsc, vitest (40 tests), bench (17 scenarios)

description: Add TypeScript project references heuristic (parses tsconfig.json references). 18/18 benchmark scenarios F1=1.0. Now 9 heuristic collectors.

asi.hypothesis: add tsconfig.json project references parsing as new heuristic
asi.coverage: npm, Cargo, Go, Python, Gemfile, git submodules, Docker Compose, TS project refs, siblings

description: Update README with Smart Suggestions section documenting all 9 heuristics. Final polish. 18/18 F1=1.0.

asi.hypothesis: update README documentation with new features
asi.summary: directory suggestion engine with 9 heuristics, 18 benchmark scenarios, 40 unit tests, integrated into /add-dir and /suggest-dirs commands

description: Add pnpm-workspace.yaml support (findWorkspaceRoot + collectWorkspaceMembers). New pnpm-mono scenario. 19/19 F1=1.0. Now 10 heuristic collectors.

asi.hypothesis: add pnpm-workspace.yaml parsing — most popular monorepo tool uses its own workspace config format, not package.json workspaces
asi.new_heuristic: pnpm-workspace.yaml pattern parsing in findWorkspaceRoot + collectWorkspaceMembers

description: Add Gradle multi-project support (settings.gradle/.kts include() parsing with colon-to-slash path conversion). New android-app scenario. 20/20 F1=1.0. Now 11 heuristic sources.

asi.hypothesis: add Gradle settings.gradle(.kts) parsing for include() project modules
asi.new_heuristic: Gradle multi-project: parses settings.gradle and settings.gradle.kts for include() calls, converts colon-delimited module paths to filesystem paths

description: Add combo-heuristics scenario (pnpm workspace + file deps + context files + non-workspace siblings). Tests multi-signal merging. 21/21 F1=1.0.

asi.hypothesis: stress-test multi-heuristic merging with pnpm workspace + file deps + context files in one scenario
asi.insight: workspace members are correctly limited to packages/* pattern, tools/* dirs not included. file:dep + workspace + CLAUDE.md all contribute to db's high score

description: Add unit tests for pnpm + Gradle heuristics. Update autoresearch.md and README with full heuristic list. 21/21 bench + 42 unit tests pass.

asi.hypothesis: add unit tests for new heuristics and update docs

description: Optimize isProject: single statSync call instead of double (file+dir). Latency 0.86→0.70ms. 21/21 F1=1.0.

asi.hypothesis: reduce statSync calls in isProject from 2 to 1 per marker
asi.insight: statSync can check existence of both files and directories in one call — no need for separate isFile/isDirectory checks when we only care about existence

description: Add Nx monorepo scenario (confirms Nx works via existing package.json workspace heuristic). isProject optimization. 22/22 F1=1.0.

asi.hypothesis: verify Nx monorepo coverage — Nx uses package.json workspaces so existing heuristic covers it
asi.insight: no special Nx heuristic needed. Nx with package.json workspaces is already fully handled by collectWorkspaceMembers.

description: Add Maven multi-module support (pom.xml <modules> parsing). New maven-project scenario. 23/23 F1=1.0. Now 12 heuristic sources across 7 ecosystems.

asi.hypothesis: add Maven pom.xml <modules> parsing for JVM multi-module projects
asi.new_heuristic: Maven multi-module: parses pom.xml <modules><module>path</module></modules> in workspace root
asi.ecosystems: npm, pnpm, Cargo, Go, Python, Ruby, Elixir, Gradle, Maven, Docker, TypeScript refs

description: Update README with Maven support. Full CI clean: lint, typecheck, 42 unit tests, 23 benchmark scenarios. All F1=1.0.

asi.hypothesis: final documentation update and verification
asi.final_state: 12 heuristic sources, 23 benchmark scenarios, 42 unit tests, F1=1.0, latency <1ms per scenario
asi.ecosystems_covered: npm, pnpm, Cargo, Go, Python, Ruby, Elixir, Gradle, Maven, Docker Compose, TypeScript project refs, git submodules

description: Add cwd-is-workspace-root edge case scenario. Confirms workspace members found when cwd=workspace root. 24/24 F1=1.0.

asi.hypothesis: test edge case where cwd is the workspace root itself, not a member
asi.insight: works correctly — findWorkspaceRoot returns cwd when it has workspace config, collectWorkspaceMembers expands patterns from there, ancestor filter doesn't interfere because members are children not ancestors

description: Expand PROJECT_MARKERS: add build.gradle.kts, deno.json, project.json (Nx). Better detection of Gradle KTS, Deno, and Nx projects. 24/24 F1=1.0.

asi.hypothesis: add more project markers for broader ecosystem detection
asi.latency_note: 0.90→1.14ms from 3 extra statSync calls per non-project dir, still well under 50ms constraint

description: Reorder PROJECT_MARKERS by frequency for faster short-circuit. Fix test timeout (24+ fixture scenarios need >10s for git inits). 24/24 F1=1.0.

asi.hypothesis: reorder project markers by frequency and fix test hook timeout
asi.test_fix: beforeAll timeout increased to 30s for 24+ fixture scenarios with git init
asi.latency_note: 0.98ms avg — lower than previous 1.14ms due to marker reordering

description: Add Yarn Berry link:/portal: protocol support. New yarn-berry scenario. 25/25 F1=1.0.

asi.hypothesis: add yarn Berry link: and portal: protocol parsing alongside existing file: in collectNpmFileDeps
asi.gap_found: yarn Berry uses link: and portal: instead of file: for local package references — previously missed
